div.p: Pure Rust handlers below; thin transports above. Same Axum router serves all surfaces.

ul.li: HTTP-EVERYWHERE — control + data both use Axum HTTP handlers (see adr-tauri-http-not-ipc). Same code path for desktop, headless, LAN, remote.
Adapter boundary (invariant I2) — crates/kikan/** contains no tauri:: types. Tauri lives only in crates/kikan-tauri/ + apps/mokumo-desktop/.
Trust model — control routes are reachable only over loopback (Tauri webview) or Unix socket (CLI). Remote and LAN clients never reach control routes; the host-allow-list middleware blocks the path.
One router — kikan::Engine::build_router<G: Graft> assembles platform routes + Graft::data_plane_routes + SubGraft routes. No router duplication between binaries.

p.em: Pure Rust functions.\nNo Tauri types in signatures.
